title: For those who missed the workshop
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey everyone! Last week I've made a post about the workshop where me and my friend Gabriel would show how we creating AI strategy that outperforms SP500 using [Alpha Builder](https://builder.limex.com/). Many people showed interest, but not everyone could attempt on November 6th. So if you missed it, here is the link to webinar recording in Zoom - [link](https://us06web.zoom.us/rec/play/Pu_lqQmWrivCz_UzfYDKMB-w1-gfe9_p8XPnj33x-5_QkmPMek_mpsMYH2v7y52ccpG2RHMQhOHx600-.2a0Uut-6hVgaLW3f?eagerLoadZvaPages=sidemenu.billing.plan_management&isReferralProgramEnabled=false&isReferralProgramAvailable=false&accessLevel=meeting&canPlayFromShare=true&from=my_recording&startTime=1762455611000&componentName=rec-play&originRequestUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fus06web.zoom.us%2Frec%2Fshare%2FIxIHkTHRZAWLwbQA77GomOipCMnlaFLnYMNJPo6XKthTCNcudSxGFA_oLIYOoacN.1ZKFRmelbkhfzqZg%3FstartTime%3D1762455611000%2520Passcode%3A%2520a%247eE4%23%2B)

Here is what we've covered during the workshop:

**Three core use cases****How the engine works (high level)****How to actually trade the outputs** (Gabriel’s part)**Ranking tools inside the app**
